examples: Now take your unworn items and start swishing.
At the bottom of the recession, she had nothing unworn, nothing new.
Mint condition vintage clothing especially unworn stock, is very rare.
To me, an ornate primping station seems a little, well, vain: delovely in theory but, like a certain over-the-top sequined dress that hangs unworn in my closet, hard to pull off in practice.
